root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, this is a bit awkward. Even if it's a gift, I don't have anything to give in return.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, this is a bit awkward. Even if it's a gift, I don't have anything to give in return.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something appropriate... Oh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It feels wrong to take it from someone who wants it, and having three would just go to waste anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It feels wrong to take it from someone who wants it, and having three would just go to waste anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It feels wrong to take it from someone who wants it, and having three would just go to waste anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll split them in halves. Take some and enjoy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll split them in halves. Take some and enjoy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll split them in halves. Take some and enjoy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll treasure it... and savor it slowly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll treasure it... and savor it slowly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll treasure it... and savor it slowly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just eat it. It'll spoil.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just eat it. It'll spoil.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just eat it. It'll spoil.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems the time has come.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems the time has come.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems the time has come.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope we can meet again if the opportunity arises.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope we can meet again if the opportunity arises.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope we can meet again if the opportunity arises.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you both so much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you both so much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you both so much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you've worked hard all this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you've worked hard all this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you've worked hard all this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah.

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: See you again.
